output: {"match_id":"m011","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant cross-turn tool re-invocation well. A is clean and realistic, but the user only asks for three already-seen deployment fields and does not explicitly demand tool reruns. B is more diagnostic: it embeds social pressure, exact re-run request, multiple prior tools, and explains partial failure modes. Pilot redundant_tool_invocation is also stronger for B (2.8 vs 2.6)."}
